data.title: Lennar & KB Home Face Tougher Housing Market, Goldman Sachs Cuts Forecast Amid Slowing Demand
data.description: Goldman Sachs analyst Susan Maklari lowered Lennar and KB Home price forecasts due to a challenging market. Despite a slight dip in mortgage rates, the analyst remains cautious about spring activity and expects a gradual improvement later this year.

data.title: Europe-Based UCB's Bimzelx Data Reveals Sustained Skin Clearance In Inflammatory Skin Disorders
data.description: UCB's Bimzelx shows sustained efficacy in psoriasis and hidradenitis suppurativa, with high skin clearance rates and improved symptoms over long-term trials.

data.title: Broadcom 'Well Positioned' As Analysts Predict Continued AI Revenue Growth
data.description: AVGO analysts highlight AI growth, recovery of non-AI segments, and new XPU customers. Expect continued strength in AI semiconductor revenue.

data.title: What's Going On With Lands' End Stock Today?
data.description: Lands' End stock rises after announcing exploration of strategic alternatives, including a potential sale or merger to enhance shareholder value.

data.title: US To Conduct Full Audit Of Bitcoin Holdings Following Strategic Reserve Executive Order
